title: 苹果 AI 国行正式上线
content: 3 月 31 日凌晨，Apple 智能国行版本正在开启推送。符合升级条件的 iPhone 将会在「设置」选项中看到原本的「Siri」选项，已经升级为「Apple 智能与 Siri」，随后进入选项，下载模型即可使用。Apple 智能国行版激活后，长按电源键将会触发「跑马灯」边框动画效果，而非传统的 Siri 跳动动画。在网友的测试中，Apple 智能国行版疑似调用了百度文心一言模型，视觉智能疑似使用 Google 的图像处理引擎能力。在拓展选项中，仍然保留了 ChatGPT 账号登录接口。升级要求必须是国行 iPhone，系统更新至最新的 iOS 26.4，iCloud 必须登录国区 Apple ID。 Readhub 热门话题 每日早报 排行榜 AI 科技动态 财经快讯 医疗产业 汽车 专业版 3 月 31 日凌晨， Apple 智能 国行版本正在开启推送。符合升级条件的 iPhone 将会在「设置」选项中看到原本的「 Siri 」选项，已经升级为「 Apple 智能与 Siri」，随后进入选项，下载模型即可使用。Apple 智能国行版激活后，长按电源键将会触发「跑马灯」边框动画效果，而非传统的 Siri 跳动动画。在网友的测试中，Apple 智能国行版疑似调用了 百度 文心一言 模型，视觉智能疑似使用 Google 的图像处理引擎能力。在拓展选项中，仍然保留了 ChatGPT 账号登录接口。升级要求必须是国行 iPhone，系统更新至最新的 iOS 26.4， iCloud 必须登录国区 Apple ID 。 ​国行版苹果 AI 突然上线后又被撤回 苹果回应：正在积极推进落地中国 每经网 / 和讯网 2026-03-31 苹果国行 AI 凌晨意外上线后紧急下线 2026-03-31 苹果 AI 国行正式上线 2025-11-26 苹果 AI 在华推进最新迹象：官网问卷仅支持 +86 手机用户提交反馈 2025-10-29 苹果 iOS 26.1 RC 准正式版发布：新增液态玻璃透明度调节、国行 AI 依然没戏 2025-10-22 苹果国行 iPhone Air 正式发售 2025-09-28 苹果秘密开发内部 AI 聊天应用，为 Siri 大升级做准备 2025-09-21 消息称苹果 iPhone Air 国行下月上市，仅以合约机形式销售 2025-09-08 苹果计划年底前在中国推出 Apple Intelligence 2025-09-04 消息称苹果自研 AI 搜索引擎「世界知识问答」，计划 2026 年春季上线 2025-08-14 消息称苹果启动 AI 双轨计划，同步推进自研和外援 查看更多 专业版功能 登录 体验专业版特色功能，拓展更丰富、更全面的相关内容。 行业标签 © 2026 NoCode 无码科技（杭州）有限公司 浙ICP备17005035号-6 联系我们 加入我们 产品介绍 浙公网安备 33010902002965 号 浙 B2-20181004

representativeSources: Readhub - 每日早报 - 极客公园
scoreReasoning: Apple's AI launch in China, significant event, high impact on AI and tech industry.
summary: On March 31, 2024 Apple launched its China‑specific AI feature for iPhones. Devices meeting the upgrade criteria will see “Apple Smart & Siri” replace the original Siri option in Settings. After activation, holding the power button triggers a marquee‑style animation instead of the usual Siri animation. The feature reportedly uses Baidu's Wenxin Yiyan model and Google’s image processing engine, while still offering a ChatGPT login interface. An upgrade requires a Mainland China iPhone, iOS 26.4, and a China‑region Apple ID.

title: AI and bots have officially taken over the internet
content: HUMAN Security's State of AI Traffic report found that bots have eclipsed human users, with automated traffic growing eight times faster than human activity. summary: Alibaba has released Qwen3.5‑Omni, a multimodal large model available in Plus, Flash, and Light sizes. It supports a 256k-token context window, over ten hours of audio input, and more than 400 seconds of 720 P video at 1 FPS. The model offers speech recognition in 113 languages and dialects and speech synthesis in 36. It can be accessed via Offline and Realtime APIs.

title: Learn Claude Code by doing, not reading
content: 11 interactive modules take you from first slash command to building plugins — with terminal simulators, config builders, and quizzes. claude .nagdy.me Learn Playground Config Builder Cheat Sheet Navigate Jump to learning, practice, or reference tools. Start Here Learning Modules Find Your Level Playground Build & Reference Config Builder Cheat Sheet Feature Index Resources Feedback Feedback Tracker Changelog Learn Claude Code by doing, not reading. by Ahmed Nagdy 11 interactive modules with terminal simulators, config builders, and quizzes. No setup required. Practice slash commands, hooks, and skills in a terminal simulator right in your browser. No setup, no API key. Interactive forms generate CLAUDE.md, hooks, and plugin configs you can copy straight into your project.

title: The ladder is missing rungs – Engineering Progression When AI Ate the Middle
content: This is a lightly edited transcript of a talk I gave at QCon London on 17 March 2026. AI is approaching perfection on exactly the tasks that used to comprise the first decade of an engineering career, and those tasks were never just tasks. They were the mechanism that built judgment, intuition, and the ability […] The ladder is missing rungs Alasdair Allan 19 March 2026 This is a lightly edited transcript of a talk I gave at QCon London on 17 March 2026 . AI is approaching perfection on exactly the tasks that used to comprise the first decade of an engineering career, and those tasks were never just tasks. They were the mechanism that built judgment, intuition, and the ability to supervise the systems we now delegate to AI. The ladder isn’t just missing rungs. It’s missing the process that created the people who built the ladder. At a conference in New York last year, Dario Amodei, the co-inventor of reinforcement learning from human feedback (RLHF) and co-founder of Anthropic, predicted that within three to six months AI would be writing 90% of all code; and within twelve months, essentially all of it. At the six-month mark, Amodei claimed vindication, saying the 90% figure was “absolutely true,” at least within Anthropic. Act I: A Prediction Expires Twelve months on, almost to the day, and well, that’s not exactly what’s happened. A detailed analysis by Redwood Research concluded that the 90% number was misleading. If you count only code committed to repositories, it was closer to 50%. Which is still a pretty shocking number. The figure

title: Google Antigravity 给所有用户免费提供 Pro 级别访问（50,000 prompt credits/月）（Claude Opus 4.6 (Thinking) /gemini 3.1 pro）免费用
content: 程序员 - @rxc420902911 - # AI 模型选择列表| 模型名称 | 状态/标签 | 含义 ||----------|-----------|------|| Gemini 3.1 Pro (High) | New AI 模型选择列表 模型名称 状态/标签 含义 Gemini 3.1 Pro (High) New Google 最新 Gemini 3.1 Pro 高性能版本，标注为新功能 Gemini 3.1 Pro (Low) New Gemini 3.1 Pro 低资源/轻量版本，标注为新功能 Gemini 3 Flash - Google Gemini 3 快速响应版本 Claude Sonnet 4.6 (Thinking) Anthropic Claude Sonnet 4.6 模型，当前正在思考/处理中 Claude Opus 4.6 (Thinking) Anthropic 最高级模型 Claude Opus 4.6 ，当前被选中且正在思考/处理中 GPT-OSS 120B (Medium) - 开源 GPT 类 120B 参数模型，中等性能档位 模型背景补充 Claude Opus ：Anthropic 旗舰级模型，擅长长文本处理、复杂逻辑推理、深度创作与高精度计算。 Claude Sonnet ：平衡性能与响应速度的中端模型，适合日常高效任务与中等复杂度需求。 Gemini 系列 ：Google 多模态大模型， Flash 侧重低延迟快速交互， Pro 系列侧重更高能力与复杂场景。 GPT-OSS 120B ：开源大模型（通常基于 LLaMA 等架构），120B 参数版本，主打开源可定制性。 如果不想用 Antigravity 也可以把里面的模型调用到其它工具中，随意你怎么用！ 问了一下 gemini 它说： 关于你提到的 Google Antigravity 提供免费 Pro 级别访问（每月 50,000 额度）的消息，这里有几点关键信息需要帮你“排雷”： 1. 是真的，但并非“永久全免费” 目前在开发者圈和 AI 社区（如 YouTube 和相关论坛）中，确实有关于 Google Antigravity 平台的讨论。它被视为 Google 面向开发者推出的一个集成开发/模型调用环境。 额度政策：它确实曾推出过针对开发者的预览版优惠，允许用户在一定限额内免费调用顶级模型（如 Gemini 3.1 Pro ）。 模型组合：你提到的 Claude Opus 4.6 (Thinking) 和 Gemini 3.1 Pro 都是 2026 年初刚发布或进入公测的顶级模型，性能极强。 2. 需要注意的“坑” 虽然听起来很诱人，但这类“免费”通常伴随着以下限制： 阶梯限制：根据最新的社区反馈，所谓的“Pro 级别访问”可能已经开始调整。部分用户发现，免费额度可能仅限基础模型（如 Gemini Flash ），而调用 Claude Opus 4.6 这种极高成本的模型时，50,000 额度（ Credits ）消耗速度非常快，有时几组深度对话就会耗尽。 账号权重：这种优惠往往针对特定的 Google 开发者账号或通过特定邀请链接加入的用户。 随时变动：Google 的策略经常调整。比如 2026 年 3 月中旬就有消息称，原有的 Pro 免费计划正在向 "Ultra" 付费订阅转型，免费额度被大幅削减。
eventKey: google-antigravity-给所有用户免费提供-pro-级别访问-000
normalizedTitle: google antigravity 给所有用户免费提供 pro 级别访问 50 000 prompt credits 月 claude opus 4 6 thinking gemini 3 1 pro 免费用
scoreReasoning: Google offering free access to AI models, significant for AI development, high relevance.
summary: Google Antigravity grants all users free Pro-level access to AI models, providing 50,000 prompt credits per month. Available models include Google’s Gemini 3.1 Pro (high and low resource variants) and Gemini 3 Flash, Anthropic’s Claude Sonnet 4.6 and flagship Claude Opus 4.6, and an open‑source GPT‑OSS 120B. Users can employ Antigravity or integrate these models into other tools as desired.

title: Marc Andreessen on Evaluating Founders and AI's Consumer Surplus
content: Marc Andreessen argues that investors should focus on a founder’s IQ, courage, and drive rather than past mistakes or just the business plan. He believes venture capital should back people, not concepts, and explains how AI is increasingly centering the tech industry in Silicon Valley. Andreessen discusses consumer surplus, noting most AI value will capture 99% for a few entities, and challenges the narrative that AI will displace labor.
source: The a16z Show - content+a16zpodcast@a16z.com (Marc Andreessen, Harry Stebbings)

title: Hamilton-Jacobi-Bellman Equation: Reinforcement Learning and Diffusion Models
content: Why the HJB is Bellman Home » Posts Hamilton-Jacobi-Bellman Equation: Reinforcement Learning and Diffusion Models Why the HJB is Bellman's equation in continuous time, why continuous time matters, and how to solve the resulting control problem with neural policy iteration. March 28, 2026 · 17 min · Daniel López Montero | Suggest Changes Table of Contents 1. Introduction Controlled diffusions (Itô processes) 2. Continuous-time Reinforcement Learning 2.1 Policy Iteration Computing the generator Policy evaluation (Feynman–Kac MC) Policy improvement 2.2 Model-Free: Continuous-Time Q-learning Example 1 — Stochastic LQR Example 2 — Merton Portfolio 3. Diffusion Models References Appendix A: LQR Derivation Appendix B: Merton Derivation Appendix C: Non-autonomous and Finite-Horizon Cases Machine learning feels recent, but one of its core mathematical ideas dates back to 1952, when Richard Bellman published a seminal paper titled “On the Theory of Dynamic Programming” [6, 7] , laying the foundation for optimal control and what we now call reinforcement learning. Later in the 50s, Bellman extended his work to continuous-time systems, turning the optimal condition into a PDE. What he later found was that this was identical to a result in physics published a century before (1840s), known as the Hamilton-Jacobi equation. Once that structure is visible, several topics line up naturally: continuous-time reinforcement learning stochastic control diffusion models optimal transport In this post I want to turn our attention to two applications of Bellman’s work: continuous-t

title: 比尔·盖茨支持的AI矿企如何卷入刚果（金）与比利时之争
content: Senior stakeholders in an AI‑driven mining company backed by Bill Gates are entangled in a dispute over older maps and geological records. These documents have become central to escalating tensions between the Democratic Republic of Congo and Belgium. The disagreement revolves around ownership and interpretation of the maps, which could influence mining rights and legal claims in the region.

title: OpenAI 为 Claude Code 做了一个调用 Codex 的插件
content: Claude Code - @Livid - https://github.com/openai/codex-plugin-cc https://github.com/openai/codex-plugin-cc cc 写码 codex review 是黄金组合。每次我都叫 codex review 然后复制到 cc 然后再复制到 codex 让它看一下再复制这样翻来覆去的。之前稍微搜了一下没看到有这样的插件，现在 openai 自己出了，不错。而且 openai 让人随意用 sub ，和 a 社也是鲜明对比，a 禁止第三方“产品或服务”使用无论 headless 还是 sdk 调用 oauth 了 pro/max sub 的 cc Anthropic 基本上就是通过各种 Claude Code 内的限制、法务、以及 DMCA 来维护 Claude Code 的一亩三分地。现在 OpenAI 在它自己的生态中插一脚，很期待 Anthropic 的后续反应。 利益相关：Claude Code 重度使用者。 同一楼，经常让 codex review claude code 的实现 这个插件真是方便了这个流程 看了一下真的是为了 review cc 写的代码而开发的，codex 不会要自降身份，沦为代码助手而不是代码主力了吧？ 这样是不是 codex 可以光明正大的看 Claude 的生成，然后拿到训练数据，争取超过 Claude 别一家独大
eventKey: openai-claude-code-做了一个调用-codex-的插件
normalizedTitle: openai 为 claude code 做了一个调用 codex 的插件
scoreReasoning: OpenAI's plugin integration has practical implications for developers.
summary: OpenAI has created a plugin that allows Claude Code to invoke the Codex model via an API call. The plugin, hosted on GitHub at https://github.com/openai/codex-plugin-cc, provides a bridge for developers integrating Codex functionality into the Claude Code environment.

title: How the AI Bubble Bursts
content: The catalysts for a crash are already laid out, and it can happen sooner than most expect. AI is here to stay. If used right, chances are it will make us all more productive. That, on the other hand, does not mean it will be a good investment. Big tech doesn’t need to win, just outspend Magnificent 7 companies are increasing capex to their biggest ever to differentiate their tech from each other and the big AI labs, but the key realization is that they don’t have to spend it to win. It’s a defensive move for them, if they commit $50B, OpenAI and Anthropic need to go raise $100B each to stay competitive, which makes them reliant on investors’ money. As the numbers get bigger, the amount of funds that can write checks of the size required to fill such amounts gets smaller. And many of them are now getting bombed in the Gulf. This is the reason there’s a push for IPOs, it’s because it’s the only option left to keep the funding coming. Taking this into account, Google is extremely well positioned to weather the storm. When they announce capex expenditure, they don’t spend it overnight. They can simply deploy month by month until their competitors struggle to raise and get forced to capitulate. At that point they can just ramp down the spending and declare victory in a cornered market. They don’t need capex, they just need to make it very clear for everyone that nobody can outspend them. It is hard to picture as numbers get so big, but Alphabet (Google’s parent) is ten times more valuable than the biggest military company 1. This also has a great implication for the Mag 7, espec

title: 腾讯宣布企业微信正式开源 CLI AI 可调用日程、文档等 7 大能力

summary: Tencent has released an open‑source CLI tool for its Enterprise WeChat platform. The CLI, available on GitHub, exposes seven core capabilities—such as messaging, address book, documents, and smart spreadsheets—for use by mainstream AI agents. Aimed mainly at small companies (10 or fewer users), it enables developers to quickly build AI applications. Integration involves three steps: configure the bot in the Enterprise WeChat backend, install the CLI and skill package, and call the provided skills to access the features.

title: Coding Agents Could Make Free Software Matter Again
content: I've been vibe-coding a lot lately. Like, a lot a lot Skip to content George London Software Raconteur AI Agents Could Make Free Software Matter Again Posted on March 28, 2026 March 28, 2026 by George London I’ve been vibe-coding a lot lately. Like, a lot a lot. Maybe not quite the “AI psychosis” Andrej Karpathy recently joked about on No Priors , but not wildly far off either.[1] But the more I vibe, the more a thought recurs, i.e. that AI coding agents may be about to make free software matter more than it ever has. Not open source in the bland corporate sense. I mean free software in Stallman’s sense: software that gives users the freedom to run it, study it, modify it, and share it. Even for the relatively few who were aware of the distinction, it has felt mostly academic for a long time. SaaS made it hard to care software freedom because most people never saw or touched the source code of software they depended on in the first place. The code lived on someone else’s servers, the vendor handled operations, and the practical question became convenience, not freedom. Agents change that. If an agent can read a codebase, understand it, and modify it on your behalf, then access to source code stops being a symbolic right for programmers and becomes a practical capability for far more people. Suddenly the difference between software you can change and software you can only beg starts to really matter. And I don’t just think this in the abstract. I recently tried to get an AI agent to customize a SaaS app for me, and the experience made
eventKey: coding-agents-could-make-free-software
normalizedTitle: coding agents could make free software matter again
scoreReasoning: Potential impact on free software with AI tools; high relevance to AI and tech users.
summary: Coding agents—automated tools that generate program code—could revive the importance of free software by making it easier to create and modify open‑source solutions. By automating routine coding tasks, these agents enable developers to focus on higher‑level design and community collaboration, potentially increasing the quantity and quality of freely available code. This shift may reinvigorate the free‑software ecosystem, encouraging shared innovation and cost‑effective software development.

title: 今天和 HR 说取消校招，因为上周一个需求让我后背发凉
content: 职场话题 - @Robot2012 - 前两年大家喊 AI 替代程序员，我没当回事。那时候的模型写写单测还凑合，碰到微服务和历史屎山就开始一本正经地胡说八道。上周有个需求改变了我的看法。要重构一个跑了七年的订单结算模块，历史 前两年大家喊 AI 替代程序员，我没当回事。那时候的模型写写单测还凑合，碰到微服务和历史屎山就开始一本正经地胡说八道。 上周有个需求改变了我的看法。 要重构一个跑了七年的订单结算模块，历史数据迁移、分布式事务、顺带把 CI/CD 流水线升了。我原计划让两个两年经验的开发花两周搞定。 后来手贱，把 API 文档、数据库 Schema 和业务上下文打包丢给 Claude code ，模型用的 Claude 4.6 Sonnet 。 二十分钟后，它交给我：重构后的 Go 代码、完整单测、Kubernetes 部署 yaml 。 但让我不安的不是速度。是它在我没提示的情况下，主动指出了两个并发问题：订单状态流转缺乐观锁保护，结算任务在高并发下会重复触发。这不是代码补全，这是 Code Review 。 代码我们做了完整测试，跑通了，合并进主干了。 人类开发做这件事要多久？两个人、两周、沟通联调加 Code Review ，起码小半个月。一个初中级开发月薪加五险一金和工位成本两万起步，还带薪拉屎、有情绪、会离职。而现在，几十刀的订阅费加一点 Token 消耗，就能换来这个。 今早看着组里年轻人为 Redis 缓存穿透的八股文争来争去，我说不上来是什么感觉。 ---------------------------------------------------------------- 有几个问题想问大家： 你们公司 HC 现在什么情况？是真在招人，还是在偷偷用 AI 消化需求，只是没人敢说出来？ 基础架构工作被 AI 吃掉之后，下一代架构师从哪里长出来？底层断掉了，上面还能接上吗？ 现在还在刷题背八股准备春招的应届生，你们怎么看这件事？ 还是说，其实大家早就这么干了，只是没人愿意公开讲？ 人是真人，事是真事，确实很久没发帖子让 AI 润色了下内容，没想到引起大家这么大的争议和讨论，抱歉~ 感谢有些朋友的真诚建议，我之前一直是古法编程刚走上 AI coding 之路的中登程序员，来 V2 向各大佬学习，与时俱进 求 V2 大佬请轻喷，小弟缩回狗头~ AI 不会替代所有人，只是替代绝大多数人。 以前的 10 个岗位变成 2 个岗位+ai 。 架构师？ 以后能入行都是架构师。AI 对所有智力溢价的岗位都是降维打击，一下把高收入岗位全部变成了过饱和。 这一看就是培训班或者啥宣讲班的文案，渲染焦虑，满满 AI 味，给你两个铜币，去别处讨饭吃吧 我觉得让 ai 做代码迁移/转换应该问题不大，即使 python 转成 go 什么的，都没问题。但是如果你要让他从文本需求开始跑通业务逻辑，我感觉绝对差一口气（那种标准的 mis 系统什么的除外啊，这没难度） 眼界小了，AI 不止局限于互联网，现在有了 AI ，所有行业都可用软件快速替代，这市场一下子就变大了百倍不止，需求反而变大了。
eventKey: 今天和-说取消校招-因为上周一个需求让我后背发凉
normalizedTitle: 今天和 hr 说取消校招 因为上周一个需求让我后背发凉
scoreReasoning: Impressive AI application in code refactoring; high relevance to AI and tech users.
summary: The author, who previously dismissed AI, had a change of heart after an AI model (Claude 4.6 Sonnet) refactored a seven‑year‑old order‑settlement module in 20 minutes, producing Go code, tests, Kubernetes YAML, and identifying concurrency bugs it had not been instructed to find. The AI delivered a full code review that would normally require weeks of human effort, costing only a subscription fee. The author questions whether companies are outsourcing hiring to AI, the future of architecture roles, and how current graduates respond to such shifts.

title: 伊朗袭击航母后油价上涨、股市下跌：市场综述
content: Oil prices continued to rise after Iran attacked a crude‑oil tanker, extending gains noted in a recent market wrap. The incident prompted further upward pressure on benchmarks, reflecting heightened supply‑chain concerns and geopolitical risk in the Persian Gulf. Speculation about the attack’s impact on regional shipping and overall oil availability helped sustain the rally.

title: 带崩全球存储股的谷歌论文被中国学者指控学术不端
content: 谷歌研究院论文称新算法 TurboQuant 可大幅压缩 AI 大模型内存占用，遭苏黎世联邦理工学院博士后高健扬指控存在学术问题，如回避与 RaBitQ 算法相似性等。高健扬团队多次沟通，谷歌未彻底修正，还计划在 ICLR 2026 展示该论文。高健扬表示谷歌「知错不改」，自己在论文正式发表前就已指出问题，谷歌仍未彻底修正。高健扬团队接下来计划发布技术报告，继续寻求学术渠道解决。 Readhub 热门话题 每日早报 排行榜 AI 科技动态 财经快讯 医疗产业 汽车 专业版 谷歌 研究院论文称新算法 TurboQuant 可大幅压缩 AI 大模型内存占用，遭 苏黎世联邦理工学院 博士后高健扬指控存在学术问题，如回避与 RaBitQ 算法相似性等。高健扬团队多次沟通，谷歌未彻底修正，还计划在 ICLR 2026 展示该论文。高健扬表示谷歌「知错不改」，自己在论文正式发表前就已指出问题，谷歌仍未彻底修正。高健扬团队接下来计划发布技术报告，继续寻求学术渠道解决。 独家对话！带崩全球存储股的谷歌论文陷学术争议，中国学者指其「严重失实」且「知错不改」：使用了我们的方法，但刻意回避相似性 每经网 干崩存储股的谷歌爆红论文塌房！被曝抄袭、贬低华人学者成果，谷歌回应：晚点改 网易科技 / 智东西 带崩全球存储股的谷歌论文陷学术争议，中国学者指其「严重失实」且「知错不改」：使用了我们的方法，但刻意回避相似性 华尔街见闻 2026-03-30 带崩全球存储股的谷歌论文被中国学者指控学术不端 2019-10-23 谷歌「量子优越性」论文正式发表，遭 IBM 质疑 2019-10-22 IBM 反驳谷歌实现「量子霸权」论文：他们操纵了测试结果 2019-07-10 谷歌回应 AI 专利争议：为了防御，不会牟利 专业版功能 登录 体验专业版特色功能，拓展更丰富、更全面的相关内容。 行业标签

scoreReasoning: Accusation of academic misconduct, important for AI research community, but not a strong signal.
summary: Google researchers claim their TurboQuant algorithm greatly reduces AI model memory usage, but a postdoc from ETH Zurich accuses the paper of academic misconduct, citing omitted similarities to the RaBitQ method and uncorrected issues. Despite repeated outreach, Google has not fully revised the paper and still plans to present it at ICLR 2026. The accuser is preparing a technical report to pursue further academic scrutiny.

title: FirstFT：能源冲击下，亚洲各国竭力捍卫本国货币
content: Asian nations are fighting to shield their currencies after an energy shock triggered volatility in the global market. Rising global energy prices pressured local currencies, prompting central banks and governments to intervene and defend national currencies against sharp depreciation. These coordinated efforts aim to stabilize exchange rates and mitigate the impact of heightened energy costs on domestic economies.

title: 联合利华接近与味好美达成600亿美元的交易
content: Unilever is close to agreeing on a $60 billion deal with Wanhua, creating a new food industry giant. The transaction, valued at roughly $60 billion including debt, will combine the two companies’ operations.

title: 伊朗战争正让那些我们宁愿遗忘的事情重现
content: The Iran–Iraq War is resurfacing memories and consequences that many would rather forget, as reported by Bloomberg. The conflict’s long‑lasting social, economic, and cultural impacts continue to emerge in the region, revealing lingering trauma, displaced communities, and ongoing geopolitical tensions that shape contemporary Iranian society.

title: 伊朗拟对霍尔木兹海峡收费，美方威胁「彻底摧毁」其石油设施，这场互相锁喉的交锋，谁会先松手？最后谁买单？
content: Iran’s parliament approved a bill charging ships passing the Strait of Hormuz and banning U.S. and Israeli vessels. In response, the United States threatened to “completely destroy” Iranian oil facilities, escalating tensions over access to the critical waterway.
eventKey: 伊朗拟对霍尔木兹海峡收费-美方威胁「彻底摧毁」其石油设施-这场互相锁喉的交锋-谁会先松手-最后谁买单
